title: Refactor a sleep-based worker test to use notify+allow+assert_receive
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/process_sleep_flaky.ex` uses `Process.sleep(200)` to wait for a `DeliveryWorker`. Rewrite to `test/my_app/inbox/inbox_delivery_test.exs`: (1) change the worker call to pass `notify: self()` as an option, (2) after spawning, call `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow(MyApp.Repo, self(), worker_pid)`, (3) use `assert_receive({:delivered, _}, 1_000)` to synchronize, (4) assert the final DB state. Must NOT contain Process.sleep.
tier_rationale: Three-step refactor — notify plumbing, allow, assert_receive. Connects flaky-diagnosis to LV integration.
research_citation: Iron Law: No Process.sleep. Use assert_receive with timeout.
